It stands out as the sole B2B2C app amidst major industry players including Apple, TurboTax, and HSBC. This announcement was made in New York on April 7, 2026. data.title: Helio Genomics Appoints Experienced Healthcare Technology Executive John Doyle to its Board of Directors
data.description: Helio Genomics, Inc., a TechBio company utilizing AI technology for early cancer detection, has appointed a new board member to enhance governance, innovation strategy, and long-term value creation. The announcement was made on April 7, 2026, in Irvine, California. This move aims to strengthen the company's position in AI-driven disease detection, emphasizing the importance of leveraging advanced technology for improving healthcare outcomes.

data.title: Bullied for Being Quiet, He Built a Wearable AI That's Changing How We See the World
data.description: Moxiebyte Inc. has recently unveiled Scople, a cutting-edge wearable artificial intelligence device designed to transform daily interactions into valuable insights. The launch took place in Tokyo on April 7, 2026. The inspiration behind this innovation came from the common contemplation of whether one is truly noticed by others. The mind behind Scople, Vladyslav Nestor, embarked on this journey to address this pondering, and the device stands as a testament to his vision. With the ability to decode and analyze people's behaviors, Scople serves as a tool for enhanced self-awareness. This revolutionary wearable AI opens up new possibilities for individuals seeking to understand and improve their social impact.

data.title: KC Design Week Returns April 22 - 30 Showcasing Kansas City's Strength as a Leading Design City
data.description: The Center for Architecture & Design is hosting a citywide event showcasing 19 experiences that celebrate innovative ideas and creative talent. KC Design Week is open to the public and offers a range of free and paid events. Residents of Kansas City, Missouri can participate by purchasing tickets from kcdesignweek.org. The event is set to take place from April 7, 2026.

data.title: Pye-Barker Fire & Safety Acquires Communication Systems International dba CSI, Broadens Service Capabilities in Texas
data.description: In Atlanta on April 7, 2026, Pye-Barker Fire & Safety, the top fully integrated fire protection, life safety, and security services provider in the US, announced the acquisition of Communication Systems International, known as CSI. This acquisition expands Pye-Barker's capabilities, making it even more comprehensive in its services.

data.title: Anixa Biosciences to Participate in Water Tower Research Insights Conference on April 14, 2026
data.description: A recent Phase 1 clinical trial for a breast cancer vaccine has shown promising outcomes, meeting primary goals and stimulating protocol-defined immune responses in 74% of the participants. On the other hand, an ongoing Phase 1 clinical trial for an ovarian cancer CAR-T therapy called lira-cel is showing encouraging survival data. The results were discussed in SAN JOSE, Calif., on April 7, 2026.

data.title: Decisions of Ecopetrol's Board of Directors
data.description: Colombian energy company Ecopetrol S.A. (BVC: ECOPETROL; NYSE: EC) based in Bogotá disclosed on April 7, 2026, that its Board of Directors gave the green light to an unpaid leave application from the firm's President, Mr. Ricardo Roa Barragán, during a session conducted on April 6, 2026.

data.title: Algenesis Cuts Carbon Footprint by Up to 65% with Soleic® Bio-Based Materials
data.description: On April 7, 2026, in San Diego, Algenesis Labs unveiled their latest findings on the Product Carbon Footprint (PCF) for their Soleic® product range. The results demonstrate that these bio-based and biodegradable polyurethane materials have the potential to slash greenhouse gas emissions by a substantial 65%. This advancement marks a significant step towards sustainability in manufacturing processes.

data.title: Chick-fil-A Awards More Than $29 Million in Scholarships
data.description: For over five decades, the company has been dedicated to investing in the education of upcoming generations. Recently, Chick-fil-A, Inc. distributed over $29 million in scholarships to 16,000 restaurant Team Members as part of the Chick-fil-A Remarkable Futures® Scholarships initiative. This program demonstrates the company's commitment to supporting the educational pursuits of its employees.

data.title: Global Fibertech Launches Project AURA: Solar-Powered Humanitarian Lighting for Disaster Zones
data.description: Winter Haven, Florida - On April 7, 2026, Global Fibertech introduced Project AURA, a solar-powered lighting solution aimed at offering safe and dependable illumination in disaster-stricken communities and regions lacking access to electricity. This initiative signifies Global Fibertech's commitment to addressing the issue of inadequate lighting in such areas and promoting sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: Something Big Is Coming from Celluma -- See the Reveal April 16
data.description: Marking a milestone of 15 years of groundbreaking advancements, Celluma welcomes both consumers and healthcare experts to a special live unveiling gathering. Located in TUSTIN, Calif., on April 7, 2026, BioPhotas, Inc., renowned for their creation of Celluma Light Therapy and for leading the way in therapeutic LED light therapy, is hosting this event.

data.title: Outlook Therapeutics Announces Formal Dispute Resolution Request for ONS-5010/LYTENAVA™ (bevacizumab-vikg) Accepted by FDA
data.description: Iselin, N.J., on April 7, 2026 - Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: OTLK), a biopharmaceutical firm focusing on improving the standard of care for bevacizumab in treating retina diseases, revealed the submission of a formal dispute resolution request (FDRR) to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) post their recent Type A meeting discussing the December 30, 2025 Complete Response Letter (CRL) for the Biologics License Application (BLA) for ONS-5010/LYTENAVA™ (bevacizumab-vikg) aiming to address neovascular age-related macular degeneration. The FDA has accepted the FDRR, scheduling a meeting in April 2026 with the deciding official.

data.title: $11.4B lost in 2025 due to crypto scams, with older Americans accounting for almost 40% of losses, per FBI report.
data.description: In 2025, nearly 40% of cryptocurrency fraud losses were shouldered by elderly individuals in the United States. This demographic faced a significant portion of the total losses, highlighting their vulnerability to investment scams and fraudulent activities involving cryptocurrency ATMs.

data.title: Frankenmuth Insurance Names Amy Bingham as Chief Information Officer
data.description: Frankenmuth Insurance has announced Amy Bingham as their new Chief Information Officer. This appointment signifies a strategic move for the company as it seeks to enhance its technological capabilities. Bingham brings with her a wealth of experience in the field, having previously worked for a number of prominent companies. This decision comes at a critical time, with the insurance industry experiencing rapid digital transformation. Overall, this move positions Frankenmuth Insurance to stay competitive in the market and adapt to the changing landscape.

data.title: Parks Associates: 74% of Security Dealers Have Lost Residential Security Systems Sales to DIY Systems or Standalone Video Devices
data.description: Security dealers are being compelled to adapt their sales channels and product offerings due to the growing demand for DIY solutions. Recent research conducted in Dallas on April 7, 2026, revealed that dealers are encountering stiff competition as consumer interest in DIY systems and standalone cameras surges. This shift in preferences has prompted dealers to reassess their strategies in order to stay relevant in the market.

data.title: Relievus Opens Advanced Pain Management Clinic in Lancaster, PA
data.description: Relievus Pain Management has recently revealed the inauguration of its larger clinic in Lancaster, Pennsylvania. The newly expanded facility, located at 2301 Harrisburg Pike, has been specifically crafted to offer patients cutting-edge, minimally invasive therapies tailored to alleviate chronic pain.

data.title: ReloQuest Achieves SOC 2 Compliance, Reinforcing Commitment to Security and Client Trust
data.description: In Weston, Florida on April 7, 2026, ReloQuest made an announcement that they have attained SOC 2 compliance. This achievement highlights the company's dedication to upholding the highest standards in transforming the corporate housing industry.
